FabLab

Learning about our fabulous FabLab

Feb 4, 2026

ASK Salt Spring welcomes FabLab administrator Ryan Shepard, who shares how the fully Wilding Foundation–funded makerspace has grown from 30–40% capacity to nearly 100%, averaging 25 new visitors each month.
